summary: Portal app with record management enhancements being built. User is confirming and building features in parts, currently on Part 1a (Bulk Select & Delete).
architectural_notes: Portal is being enhanced incrementally with user confirmation before each part is built
known_issues: Previous build attempts (Version 38 enhancements) failed with AI processing errors; breaking into smaller sub-parts to mitigate

existing_features.title: Add a checkbox to each record row in the Memberships, Publishing Works, Releases, Recording Projects, and Artist Development list pages to allow individual record selection.

Add a 'Select All' checkbox in the table header of each portal list page that toggles selection of all currently visible records. If all records are selected, it deselects all; if any are unselected, it selects all.
Display a 'Delete Selected' bulk action button above each portal section table whenever one or more records are selected. The button must be hidden when no records are selected.

Show a confirmation dialog when the 'Delete Selected' button is clicked. The dialog must display the number of records to be deleted and require explicit user confirmation before proceeding. Cancelling the dialog must leave all records intact.

Wire the frontend confirmation dialog's 'Confirm Delete' action to call the appropriate backend bulk delete function for the current portal section, then refresh the list and clear all selections on success. Show a success toast with the count of deleted records. Show an error banner if the operation fails.

new_feature_requests.summary: Part 1a: Bulk select and delete records across all portal sections with confirmation dialog
Part 1b: Duplicate/clone records and archive (soft delete) with restore capability
Part 1c: Record history/audit log showing creator, editor, timestamps in a timeline panel
Part 2: Global search, per-section column filters, sort by column, save filter presets, export to CSV
Part 3: Summary dashboard with stats, visual charts, recent activity feed, quick-access widgets
Part 4: Admin vs standard user roles, role management screen, locked sections for authorized users
Part 5: File and image attachments per record with inline preview, download, and multi-attachment support
Part 6: In-app notification bell with activity feed, mark as read, and per-user notification preferences
Part 7: Comments/notes thread on each record with add/edit/delete, timestamps, and author display
Part 8: Admin settings for renaming sections, toggle sections on/off, branding customization, custom fields

Implement bulk delete backend logic: add a batch delete function for each entity type (Membership, PublishingWork, Release, RecordingProject, ArtistDevelopment) that accepts an array of record IDs and deletes all matching records in a single call, respecting existing authorization rules (admin can delete any, owner can delete their own).
